title: Bridge Essay: The optimal balance of controlled and spontaneous processing in insight problem

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through The, optimal, balance, of, controlled.

**The optimal balance of controlled and spontaneous processing in insight problem solving: fMRI evidence from Chinese idiom guessing.** — Psychophysiology. PMID: 36651323. DOI: 10.1111/psyp.14240. Cognitive control is akey factor in insight generation. However, the neurocognitive mechanisms underlying the generation of insight for different cognitive control remain poorly understood. This study developed aparametric fMRI design, wherein hints for solving Chinese idiom riddles were gradually provided in astepwise manner (from the first hint, H1, to the final hint, H4). By classifying the step-specific items solved in different hint-uncovering steps/conditions, we could identify insightf
